item.title: Liizousuda Paint Thinner Bottles Recalled Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Child Poisoning; Violate Mandatory Standard for Child-Resistant Packaging; Sold on Amazon.com by Shenzhen Gudebo Technology
item.company: Online at Amazon.com from March 2025 through February 2026 for about $10.
item.brand: Online at Amazon.com from March 2025 through February 2026 for about $10.
item.summary: This recall involves Liizousuda paint thinner bottles. The paint thinner comes in a clear bottle with a black cap and a wraparound label. The label states "Odorless Mineral Spirit" and "Artist Oil Thinning Medium" in large text.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: Liizousuda Paint Thinner.
item.remedy: Consumers should secure the recalled paint thinner out of the sight and reach of children immediately and contact Shenzhen Gudebo Technology for information on how to obtain a replacement bottle with a child-resistant closure, into which consumers should transfer the recalled bottle's contents.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
